title: Xtra Crispy Uruguayan Fries Wrap
description: A malty, light, and festive Uruguayan dish featuring crispy fries and a flexitarian-friendly ssam-wrap, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Cut the potatoes into long thin strips and soak them in cold water for 30 minutes.
Drain the potatoes and dry them thoroughly with paper towels.
Toss the potatoes with olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika until they are evenly coated.
Spread the potatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and increase the oven temperature to 425 degrees.
Return the potatoes to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until crispy.
Wrap each ssam wrap around a portion of the crispy fries and drizzle with malt vinegar.
